decisions.rationale: Observation maps to its own base_record_id corridor_hylan-boulevard-brt, which is already in the canonical registry with matching aliases (including corridor_hylan-blvd-study-corridor-2012-03), matching borough (Staten Island), and the same source ID (2012_03_15_brt_hylan_meeting_slides). No other registry record represents the same entity.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The map illustrates the Hylan Boulevard Study Corridor in Queens, New York City.

decisions.rationale: Observation maps to its own base_record_id corridor_richmond-ave-hylan-2011, which is already in the canonical registry with matching alias corridor_richmond-ave-hylan-2012-03, matching street (Richmond Avenue), matching borough (Staten Island), matching description (part of Hylan Boulevard Transportation Improvement Study), and identical source ID (2012_03_15_brt_hylan_meeting_slides). No other registry record represents the same entity.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The main map shows the Richmond Avenue corridor from Richmond AV to Bay Ridge.
